name: fetch-frequencies registry: per-registry defaults apply symmetrically to standards, pr-corpus, and compliance
command:
printf 'registries:
  standards: 12h
  pr-corpus: 6h
  compliance: 2h
' > ff.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/fetch-frequency-registry.sh" --source-id a --registry standards --file "$PWD/ff.yaml"; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/fetch-frequency-registry.sh" --source-id b --registry pr-corpus --file "$PWD/ff.yaml"; bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/fetch-frequency-registry.sh" --source-id c --registry compliance --file "$PWD/ff.yaml"
